# all-features section.
# DO NOT EDIT BY HAND — commit regenerated changes together with the code.

pub enum iwssim_gpu::IwssimStrategy
pub iwssim_gpu::IwssimStrategy::ReflectPad
pub iwssim_gpu::IwssimStrategy::Reject
pub iwssim_gpu::IwssimStrategy::Tile
impl core::clone::Clone for iwssim_gpu::IwssimStrategy
pub fn iwssim_gpu::IwssimStrategy::clone(&self) -> iwssim_gpu::IwssimStrategy
impl core::cmp::Eq for iwssim_gpu::IwssimStrategy
impl core::cmp::PartialEq for iwssim_gpu::IwssimStrategy
pub fn iwssim_gpu::IwssimStrategy::eq(&self, &iwssim_gpu::IwssimStrategy) -> bool
impl core::default::Default for iwssim_gpu::IwssimStrategy
pub fn iwssim_gpu::IwssimStrategy::default() -> iwssim_gpu::IwssimStrategy
impl core::fmt::Debug for iwssim_gpu::IwssimStrategy
pub fn iwssim_gpu::IwssimStrategy::fmt(&self, &mut core::fmt::Formatter<'_>) -> core::fmt::Result
impl core::marker::Copy for iwssim_gpu::IwssimStrategy
impl core::marker::StructuralPartialEq for iwssim_gpu::IwssimStrategy
impl core::marker::Freeze for iwssim_gpu::IwssimStrategy
impl core::marker::Send for iwssim_gpu::IwssimStrategy
impl core::marker::Sync for iwssim_gpu::IwssimStrategy
impl core::marker::Unpin for iwssim_gpu::IwssimStrategy
impl core::marker::UnsafeUnpin for iwssim_gpu::IwssimStrategy
impl core::panic::unwind_safe::RefUnwindSafe for iwssim_gpu::IwssimStrategy
impl core::panic::unwind_safe::UnwindSafe for iwssim_gpu::IwssimStrategy
pub enum iwssim_gpu::MemoryMode
pub iwssim_gpu::MemoryMode::Auto
pub iwssim_gpu::MemoryMode::Full
pub iwssim_gpu::MemoryMode::Strip
pub iwssim_gpu::MemoryMode::Strip::h_body: core::option::Option<u32>
pub iwssim_gpu::MemoryMode::Tile
pub iwssim_gpu::MemoryMode::Tile::h: u32
pub iwssim_gpu::MemoryMode::Tile::w: u32
impl core::clone::Clone for iwssim_gpu::memory_mode::MemoryMode

impl core::cmp::Eq for iwssim_gpu::memory_mode::MemoryMode
impl core::cmp::PartialEq for iwssim_gpu::memory_mode::MemoryMode

impl core::fmt::Debug for iwssim_gpu::memory_mode::MemoryMode
pub fn iwssim_gpu::memory_mode::MemoryMode::fmt(&self, &mut core::fmt::Formatter<'_>) -> core::fmt::Result

impl core::marker::StructuralPartialEq for iwssim_gpu::memory_mode::MemoryMode
impl core::marker::Freeze for iwssim_gpu::memory_mode::MemoryMode
impl core::marker::Send for iwssim_gpu::memory_mode::MemoryMode

impl core::marker::Unpin for iwssim_gpu::memory_mode::MemoryMode

pub iwssim_gpu::ResolvedMode::Full
pub iwssim_gpu::ResolvedMode::Strip

pub struct iwssim_gpu::GpuIwssimResult
pub iwssim_gpu::GpuIwssimResult::per_scale: [f64; 5]

pub struct iwssim_gpu::IwssimConfig
pub iwssim_gpu::IwssimConfig::strategy: iwssim_gpu::IwssimStrategy
impl iwssim_gpu::IwssimConfig
pub const fn iwssim_gpu::IwssimConfig::adaptive() -> Self
pub const fn iwssim_gpu::IwssimConfig::allow_small(bool) -> Self
pub const fn iwssim_gpu::IwssimConfig::reflect_pad() -> Self
impl core::clone::Clone for iwssim_gpu::IwssimConfig
pub fn iwssim_gpu::IwssimConfig::clone(&self) -> iwssim_gpu::IwssimConfig

pub struct iwssim_gpu::IwssimOpaque
impl iwssim_gpu::IwssimOpaque
pub fn iwssim_gpu::IwssimOpaque::clear_reference(&mut self)
pub fn iwssim_gpu::IwssimOpaque::compute_gray_f32(&mut self, &[f32], &[f32]) -> iwssim_gpu::Result<zenmetrics_gpu_core::Score>
pub fn iwssim_gpu::IwssimOpaque::compute_handles(&mut self, &cubecl_runtime::server::handle::Handle, &cubecl_runtime::server::handle::Handle) -> iwssim_gpu::Result<zenmetrics_gpu_core::Score>
pub fn iwssim_gpu::IwssimOpaque::compute_pixels(&mut self, zenpixels::buffer::PixelSlice<'_>, zenpixels::buffer::PixelSlice<'_>) -> iwssim_gpu::Result<zenmetrics_gpu_core::Score>
pub fn iwssim_gpu::IwssimOpaque::compute_srgb_u8(&mut self, &[u8], &[u8]) -> iwssim_gpu::Result<zenmetrics_gpu_core::Score>
pub fn iwssim_gpu::IwssimOpaque::compute_with_reference_srgb_u8(&mut self, &[u8]) -> iwssim_gpu::Result<zenmetrics_gpu_core::Score>
pub fn iwssim_gpu::IwssimOpaque::dims(&self) -> (u32, u32)
pub fn iwssim_gpu::IwssimOpaque::has_reference(&self) -> bool
pub fn iwssim_gpu::IwssimOpaque::n_scales(&self) -> usize
pub fn iwssim_gpu::IwssimOpaque::new(zenmetrics_gpu_core::Backend, u32, u32, iwssim_gpu::IwssimParams) -> iwssim_gpu::Result<Self>
pub fn iwssim_gpu::IwssimOpaque::new_with_memory_mode(zenmetrics_gpu_core::Backend, u32, u32, iwssim_gpu::IwssimParams, iwssim_gpu::memory_mode::MemoryMode) -> iwssim_gpu::Result<Self>
pub fn iwssim_gpu::IwssimOpaque::pack_srgb_into_packed_u32_handle(&self, &[u8]) -> iwssim_gpu::Result<cubecl_runtime::server::handle::Handle>
pub fn iwssim_gpu::IwssimOpaque::set_reference_srgb_u8(&mut self, &[u8]) -> iwssim_gpu::Result<()>
impl core::marker::Freeze for iwssim_gpu::IwssimOpaque
impl core::marker::Send for iwssim_gpu::IwssimOpaque
impl !core::marker::Sync for iwssim_gpu::IwssimOpaque
impl core::marker::Unpin for iwssim_gpu::IwssimOpaque
impl core::marker::UnsafeUnpin for iwssim_gpu::IwssimOpaque
impl !core::panic::unwind_safe::RefUnwindSafe for iwssim_gpu::IwssimOpaque
impl !core::panic::unwind_safe::UnwindSafe for iwssim_gpu::IwssimOpaque
#[non_exhaustive] pub struct iwssim_gpu::IwssimParams
pub iwssim_gpu::IwssimParams::allow_small: bool
impl iwssim_gpu::IwssimParams
pub const iwssim_gpu::IwssimParams::DEFAULT: Self
pub const fn iwssim_gpu::IwssimParams::allow_small(bool) -> Self
impl core::clone::Clone for iwssim_gpu::IwssimParams
pub fn iwssim_gpu::IwssimParams::clone(&self) -> iwssim_gpu::IwssimParams
impl core::default::Default for iwssim_gpu::IwssimParams
pub fn iwssim_gpu::IwssimParams::default() -> Self
impl core::fmt::Debug for iwssim_gpu::IwssimParams
pub fn iwssim_gpu::IwssimParams::fmt(&self, &mut core::fmt::Formatter<'_>) -> core::fmt::Result
impl core::marker::Copy for iwssim_gpu::IwssimParams
impl core::marker::Freeze for iwssim_gpu::IwssimParams
impl core::marker::Send for iwssim_gpu::IwssimParams
impl core::marker::Sync for iwssim_gpu::IwssimParams
impl core::marker::Unpin for iwssim_gpu::IwssimParams
impl core::marker::UnsafeUnpin for iwssim_gpu::IwssimParams
impl core::panic::unwind_safe::RefUnwindSafe for iwssim_gpu::IwssimParams
impl core::panic::unwind_safe::UnwindSafe for iwssim_gpu::IwssimParams
pub const iwssim_gpu::IWSSIM_COLUMN_NAME: &str
pub fn iwssim_gpu::estimate_gpu_memory_bytes(u32, u32) -> usize
pub fn iwssim_gpu::estimate_strip_gpu_memory_bytes(u32, u32) -> core::option::Option<usize>
pub fn iwssim_gpu::live_vram_probe_bytes() -> core::option::Option<usize>
pub fn iwssim_gpu::vram_cap_bytes() -> usize
pub type iwssim_gpu::Result<T> = core::result::Result<T, iwssim_gpu::Error>
